subject: Mathematics
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: SETS
activities: Specific Competence: Apply the concept of set-builder notation and set operations in real life.
Sets are fundamental in Mathematics and help us classify objects, ideas and concepts in a structured way. Set theory connects with the
environment, foster observations, analysis, and reasoning skills among learners.
Suggested Teaching And Learning Materials to Set up Learning Environment
What to do: Put learners in small manageable groups of different abilities.
Task: Ask learners think about things or items they encounter in daily life that can be grouped together. Let the learners in their findings
discover that the mathematical term used for items or things of common characteristics is called a set. After some time, ask some groups
assessment: Learning activity 2: Exploring types of sets
Through explorations and inquiry based learning, learners will be expected to identify and define different types of sets, and develop
critical thinking by analyzing set related problems in diverse scenarios.
